sources.expression:
$wpdb->get_row( "SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT(p.ID)) AS count FROM `$wpdb->posts` AS p
            LEFT JOIN `$wpdb->postmeta` AS m
            ON p.ID = m.post_id
            WHERE m.meta_key = '_form_id'
            AND m.meta_value = $this->_form_id
            AND p.post_status = 'publish'")

$wpdb->get_var(
		$wpdb->prepare(
			"SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pm.post_id)
			FROM {$wpdb->postmeta} pm
			INNER JOIN {$wpdb->posts} p ON pm.post_id = p.ID
			INNER JOIN {$wpdb->postmeta} pm2 ON p.ID = pm2.post_id
			WHERE pm.meta_key = %s
			AND pm.meta_value != ''
			AND pm.meta_value IS NOT NULL
			AND p.post_type = 'nf_sub'
			AND p.post_status = 'publish'
			AND pm2.meta_key = '_form_id'
			AND pm2.meta_value = %s",
			$meta_key,
			$form_id
		)
	)

$wpdb->get_row( $wpdb->prepare(
		"SELECT id, title, created_at FROM {$wpdb->prefix}nf3_forms WHERE id = %d",
		$form_id
	), ARRAY_A )

$wpdb->get_results(
                "
                SELECT Meta.key, Meta.value
                FROM $this->_table_name as Object
                JOIN $this->_meta_table_name as Meta
                ON Object.id = Meta.parent_id
                WHERE Object.id = '$this->_id'
                "
            , ARRAY_A )

$wpdb->get_results( 'SELECT id, title FROM `' . $wpdb->prefix
                    . 'nf3_forms` ORDER BY title' )

$wpdb->get_results(
                $wpdb->prepare(
                    "SELECT 
                        $entriesTable.id 
                    FROM 
                        $entriesTable 
                    INNER JOIN $valuesTable ON
                        ($entriesTable.id = $valuesTable.entry_id) 
                    WHERE 
                        $entriesTable.form_id = '%s' AND $valuesTable.value LIKE '%s' 
                    GROUP BY 
                        $entriesTable.id
                    ",
                    $cfFormId,
                    $searchString
                ),
                ARRAY_A
            )

$wpdb->get_row( "SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT(p.ID)) AS count FROM `$wpdb->posts` AS p
            LEFT JOIN `$wpdb->postmeta` AS m
            ON p.ID = m.post_id
            WHERE m.meta_key = '_form_id'
            AND m.meta_value = $form_id
            AND p.post_status = 'publish'")

$wpdb->get_row( $wpdb->prepare( "
			SELECT *
			FROM {$table}
			WHERE {$column} LIKE %s
			ORDER BY {$key_column} ASC
			LIMIT 1
		", $key ) )
$wpdb->get_results( "SELECT option_name, option_value FROM $wpdb->options WHERE option_name LIKE '_wp_session_expires_%'" )

            LEFT JOIN `$wpdb->postmeta` AS m
            ON p.ID = m.post_id
            WHERE m.meta_key = '_form_id'
            AND m.meta_value = $this->_form_id
            AND p.post_status = 'publish'")
$wpdb->query( "DELETE FROM {$wpdb->options} WHERE option_name LIKE '_transient_nf_%' OR option_name LIKE '_transient_timeout_nf_%'" )

$wpdb->get_var(
		$wpdb->prepare(
			"SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pm.post_id)
			FROM {$wpdb->postmeta} pm
			INNER JOIN {$wpdb->posts} p ON pm.post_id = p.ID
			INNER JOIN {$wpdb->postmeta} pm2 ON p.ID = pm2.post_id
			WHERE pm.meta_key = %s
			AND pm.meta_value != ''
			AND pm.meta_value IS NOT NULL
			AND p.post_type = 'nf_sub'
			AND p.post_status = 'publish'
			AND pm2.meta_key = '_form_id'
			AND pm2.meta_value = %s",
			$meta_key,
			$form_id
		)
	)

$wpdb->get_row( $wpdb->prepare(
		"SELECT id, title, created_at FROM {$wpdb->prefix}nf3_forms WHERE id = %d",
		$form_id
	), ARRAY_A )

$wpdb->get_results(
                "
                SELECT Meta.key, Meta.value
                FROM $this->_table_name as Object
                JOIN $this->_meta_table_name as Meta
                ON Object.id = Meta.parent_id
                WHERE Object.id = '$this->_id'
                "
            , ARRAY_A )

$wpdb->get_results( 'SELECT id, title FROM `' . $wpdb->prefix
                    . 'nf3_forms` ORDER BY title' )

wp_die(
                esc_html__( 'There uploaded file is not a valid format.', 'ninja-forms' ) . ' ' . $err_msg,
                esc_html__( 'Invalid Form Upload.', 'ninja-forms' )
            )
wp_die( esc_html__( 'Your request could not be verified. Please try again.', 'ninja-forms' ) )

$wpdb->get_results(
                $wpdb->prepare(
                    "SELECT 
                        $entriesTable.id 
                    FROM 
                        $entriesTable 
                    INNER JOIN $valuesTable ON
                        ($entriesTable.id = $valuesTable.entry_id) 
                    WHERE 
                        $entriesTable.form_id = '%s' AND $valuesTable.value LIKE '%s' 
                    GROUP BY 
                        $entriesTable.id
                    ",
                    $cfFormId,
                    $searchString
                ),
                ARRAY_A
            )

$wpdb->query( $wpdb->prepare(
            "
                INSERT INTO {$wpdb->prefix}nf3_forms ( `title`, `created_at` )
                SELECT CONCAT( `title`, ' - ', %s ), %s
                FROM {$wpdb->prefix}nf3_forms
                WHERE  id = %d;
            ", esc_html__( 'copy', 'ninja-forms' ), current_time( 'mysql' ), $form_id
        ) )

$wpdb->query( $wpdb->prepare(
           "
           INSERT INTO {$wpdb->prefix}nf3_form_meta ( `parent_id`, `key`, `value` )
                SELECT %d, `key`, `value`
                FROM   {$wpdb->prefix}nf3_form_meta
                WHERE  parent_id = %d
                AND `key` NOT IN({$blacklist});
           ", $new_form_id, $form_id
        ))

$wpdb->query( $wpdb->prepare(
               "
               INSERT INTO {$wpdb->prefix}nf3_fields ( {$fields_sql[ 'insert' ]} )
               SELECT {$fields_sql[ 'select' ]}
               FROM {$wpdb->prefix}nf3_fields
               WHERE id = %d
               ", $new_form_id, $old_field->id
            ))

$wpdb->query( $wpdb->prepare(
                "
               INSERT INTO {$wpdb->prefix}nf3_actions ( {$actions_sql[ 'insert' ]} )
               SELECT {$actions_sql[ 'select' ]}
               FROM {$wpdb->prefix}nf3_actions
               WHERE id = %d
               ", $new_form_id, $old_action->id
            ))

wp_remote_post(
            $this->api_url,
            array(
                'body' => array(
                    'slug'          => $slug,
                    'data'          => wp_json_encode( $data ),
                    'site_data'     => wp_json_encode( $siteEntity->jsonSerialize()),
                    'be_data'       => wp_json_encode( $be_data )
                ),
            )
        )

$wpdb->get_row( "SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT(p.ID)) AS count FROM `$wpdb->posts` AS p
            LEFT JOIN `$wpdb->postmeta` AS m
            ON p.ID = m.post_id
            WHERE m.meta_key = '_form_id'
            AND m.meta_value = $form_id
            AND p.post_status = 'publish'")

printf( __( 'There is a new version of %1$s available. %2$sView version %3$s details%4$s.', 'easy-digital-downloads' ), esc_html( $version_info->name ), '', esc_html( $version_info->new_version ), '' )

printf( __( 'There is a new version of %1$s available. %2$sView version %3$s details%4$s or %5$supdate now%6$s.', 'easy-digital-downloads' ), esc_html( $version_info->name ), '', esc_html( $version_info->new_version ), '', '', '' )
wp_die( esc_html__( 'You do not have permission to install plugin updates', 'easy-digital-downloads' ), esc_html__( 'Error', 'easy-digital-downloads' ), array( 'response' => 403 ) )

$wpdb->get_row( $wpdb->prepare( "
			SELECT *
			FROM {$table}
			WHERE {$column} LIKE %s
			ORDER BY {$key_column} ASC
			LIMIT 1
		", $key ) )
$wpdb->get_results( "SELECT option_name, option_value FROM $wpdb->options WHERE option_name LIKE '_wp_session_expires_%'" )
printf( esc_html__( "Drag & drop rows and columns, custom backgrounds, borders, & more without writing a single line of code.", 'ninja-forms' ) )
printf( esc_html__( "Show & hide fields and pages, selectively send email, & much more! Build professional forms easily.", 'ninja-forms' ) )
printf( esc_html__( "Create multiple page forms with drag-and-drop. You don't need to code to build complex forms!", 'ninja-forms' ) )
printf( esc_html__( "Let users upload files to your site! Restrict file type and size. Upload to server, media library, or cloud service.", 'ninja-forms' ) )
printf( esc_html__( "Accept credit card payments or donations from any form. Single payments, subscriptions, and more!", 'ninja-forms' ) )
printf( esc_html__( 'Form Imported Successfully. %sView Form%s', 'ninja-forms' ), '', '' )
printf( esc_html__( 'Please select a Ninja Forms export. %sMust be in .nff format%s.', 'ninja-forms' ), '', '' )
